ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio setting (e.g., pce_fast.adpcmlp) */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., boolean, integer) */,
  "possible_values" TEXT /* Possible values for the setting */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value assigned to the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting and its purpose */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., volume, filters, emulations) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device the setting is applicable to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the value type (e.g., boolean, integer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value type */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for numeric types */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for numeric types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_values" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this default value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* The default value set for the configuration */,
  "set_date" TEXT /* Date when the default value was set */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the default value */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for setting the default value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_values_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_values_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, tester, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission granted to the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* The old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The new value after the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "possible_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each possible value entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* The possible value for the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possible_values_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration that this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who triggered the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., configuration change, error) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the alert */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
